titleStmt.title: SII 8.368: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 368. (A.R. No. 88 of 1903). ON THE SAME ROCK.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābhara
ṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijeyarājyapravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ kalyāṇada nelebīḍinalu sukhasaṁkathāvinō
dadiṁ rājyaṁ sulattamire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷu sahavāsi vijṛṁbhibhaṭṭanāyakana jyēṣṭabha
ṭṭanāyaka bimmināyakanuṁ śrīmadguttiyakōṭeya rājādya
kṣadapāḷeyadintiralū ranumatyadiṁ svasti samadhigatapaṁcemahāśabda mahāmaṁḍa
ḷēsvaraṁ vīramahēśvaraṁ cōḷakaṭakakarituragapaṭusubhaṭanicayanirjjitabaḷavadaribaḷatimirakhaṁ
ḍana pratāpamārttaṁḍaṁ nikarakoḷgaṁḍaṁ draviḷamaṁḍaḷikaśiraḥkhaṁḍanaṁ maṁḍaḷika mukhamaṁḍanaṁ na
daṭa maṁḍaḷikatārakāsurāri dasakaṇṭhamurāri mitramaṁḍaḷikakuḷārnnavacaṁdraṁ bhōgāmarēṁ
dra satyavikhyātaṁ maṁḍaḷikamāndātraṁ mahāsēneyaṁkakāṟaṁ pallikōṭa gharaṭṭa ghūrjjara
diśāpaṭṭaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara kaṭṭedalagumalavaranallaguṇaṁ nāmādi samasta praśastisa
hitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ mallarasaru tuṁbuḷanelevīḍinallu sindavāḍi 1000
muvanāḷuttaṁ sukhadimire tatpādapadmōpajīvi śrīmadguttiya daṁḍanāyakaṁ mārttaṁḍa
rasaru lōkadoṇeyalu pratiṣṭhemāḍida bīmēśvaradēvargge khaṁḍasphuṭita jīrṇnōddhāriṇe
nivēdyāṣṭarcana pūjepunaskārakkemāgi śrīmanmahā maṁḍaḷēśva
ra mārttaṁḍarasaru śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakālada 33 neya sarvvadhārisaṁvatsarada jē
ṣṭadamāvāsye bṛhaspativāradaṁdu sūryyagrahaṇa nimityadiṁ yamani
yamādiguṇasamādhisaṁpannarappa kāḷāmukhatapōdhanarappa sūryyābharaṇapaṁḍita
rgge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi kōṭeya nairityadiśāvaradalu biṭṭa kariyakeyi mattaru 30 kolu
puriya suyyatigaṟde mattaru 25 Intī dharmmamaṁ sarvvābhyaṁtarasiddhiyāgi biṭaru
© mattamā sūryyagrahaṇa nimittyadiṁ nelegōṭeya sabhāmaṁṭapada vināyakadēvarasnānadhūpadī
panivēdyaṣṭārccana pūjāpunaskārakkavāgi bhāskarabhaṭṭariṁge yā sarvvābhyaṁtarasiddhiyāge biṭṭa
kariyakeyi mattaru 12 nelegōṭeyallu gāṇa 1 . bahubhirvvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarādi
bhiḥ [.] yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasyatasya tadā phalaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 8.368 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
